title: macrotyloma stenophyllum
intro: Macrotyloma stenophyllum, also known as Horse gram, is a type of legume native to India and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Macrotyloma stenophyllum include reducing cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and aiding in weight management. It can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions for consumption, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and supplements.
